violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned and sanitized slicer and placed can opener in dishwasher area during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Various packaged food items in the food establishment grab and go are lacking the address of establishment name on labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

The wall in the mop sink area is constructed of wood. This material is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable and non-absorbent. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Approved materials hand out provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The wall in the mop sink area constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Approved materials hand out provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Several foods (see disposal list) were observed held at 47-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

Noodles/pasta and baked items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The walk-in cooler was not holding adequate ambient temperature. All TCS foods were either relocated or disposed of 2) The handle on the faucet of the front hand wash sink was not dispensing water New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
The walls near the mop sink were observed in poor repair (peeling or covered with porous wood). New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
